_comment: Collection config combines runtime topology and one or more timelines. Normal controls default to all vehicles; inject_fault/clear_fault default to real vehicles so the DT stays healthy.

toolchain._comment: Enable this when the collection host also launches the DT SITL toolchain. RFV_VEHICLE_NUM should match the number of DT vehicles.

recording._comment: Recording starts after arm and stops after the final timeline command. Each timeline writes one xlsx workbook with one sheet per vehicle.

vehicles._comment: Healthy DT baseline. Set startup_delay_s/offboard_delay_s so the DT initialization duration matches the real vehicle.
Real aircraft backend. Requires ROS at runtime; ROS imports are loaded lazily only when this backend initializes.

ros._comment: set_params is optional; use it only when the ROS deployment needs explicit parameters before collection.

mocap._comment: VRPN pose topic defaults to /vrpn_client_node/{rig_prefix}{mav_id}/pose. Set pose_topic/twist_topic explicitly if needed.

timelines._comment: One timeline equals one flight round and one output xlsx file. Add more objects to run multiple rounds in one script execution.
timelines.name: Real fault injection with healthy DT baseline
